subject: space
content: The sun is a giant star. It gives us light and warmth. Without the sun, nothing could live on Earth.

subject: space
content: The sun is very far away. Light from the sun takes eight minutes to reach Earth. The sun is much bigger than Earth.

subject: space
content: The moon goes around Earth. It takes about one month to go all the way around. The moon has no air or water.

subject: space
content: The moon seems to change shape in the sky. These shapes are called phases. The full moon is when we see the whole moon.

subject: space
content: Our solar system has eight planets. They all go around the sun. Earth is the planet we live on.

subject: space
content: Jupiter is the biggest planet. It has a giant storm called the Great Red Spot. Jupiter has many moons.

subject: space
content: Saturn has beautiful rings made of ice and rock. The rings go all the way around the planet. Saturn is very light for its size.

subject: space
content: Stars are giant balls of hot gas. They make their own light. Our sun is a star.

subject: space
content: Stars look small because they are very far away. On a clear night you can see thousands of stars. Stars twinkle because of air around Earth.

subject: space
content: Astronauts are people who travel to space. They train for many years. Astronauts wear special suits to protect them in space.

subject: space
content: In space there is no gravity. Astronauts float around their spacecraft. They have to strap themselves in to sleep.

subject: space
content: Rockets carry astronauts and satellites into space. They use powerful fuel to go very fast. Rockets have to go fast to leave Earth.

subject: space
content: Our solar system is inside a galaxy called the Milky Way. A galaxy has billions of stars. The Milky Way looks like a band of light in the sky.

subject: space
content: Earth spins like a top. When your side faces the sun it is daytime. When your side faces away it is nighttime.

subject: space
content: The International Space Station is a big spacecraft where astronauts live and work. It goes around Earth very fast. Scientists do experiments there.
